title: Customer cum Admin Officer
description:
Job Summary

We're looking for a skilled and enthusiastic individual to join our team as a Customer Service cum Admin Officer!

Responsibilities

  • Greet and register walk-in customers promptly at the front counter to ensure a welcoming experience
  • Manage customer flow and provide assistance to maintain smooth operations
  • Support the Manager in organizing events and inviting customers to participate
  • Handle difficult customer interactions professionally, completing necessary checklists before escalating to the Manager
  • Collect, verify, and organize customer documents to maintain accurate and accessible records
  • Respond promptly and clearly to telephone and email inquiries to resolve customer questions
  • Provide administrative support including data entry, filing, processing correspondence, and preparing videoconferencing equipment for appointments
  • Assist customers with online payment processes and perform basic account-related tasks
  • Maintain office cleanliness and oversee office contracts to ensure a well-functioning workspace
  • Procure groceries and stationery supplies for office use through simple purchasing tasks
  • Perform basic accounting duties by filing and recording payment vouchers accurately

Required competencies and certifications

  • Good at social media skills like posting in tiktok, facebook,etc
  • Able to use AI apps to translate Chinese documents to English for powerpoint presenation
  • Conversant in Mandarin and English to manage majority Chinese customers.

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum GCE O level with 1 to 2 years of experience in customer service or front desk or accounting roles
  • Proficiency in English and Mandarin or dialects to communicate effectively in a multilingual environment
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills to address customer inquiries and manage challenging situations with professionalism and empathy
  • Friendly and patient demeanor to handle high volumes of customer interactions, including sensitive or complex issues

Other Information

  • Working hours: Mondays to Fridays, 10 am - 7 pm
  • Location: Near Kent Ridge MRT
  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE GOLDEN DAYS SNOW LOTUS ECOLOGICAL MAINTENANCE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
